description: CLI convention enforcement. PreToolUse warns on bad patterns. SessionStart scopes reminder to CLI projects only.

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f src/cli.ts ] || ([ -f package.json ] && grep -q "\"hud\"" package.json 2>/dev/null); then echo "{\"continue\":true,\"systemMessage\":\"CLI project detected. Rules: model IDs only in src/models.ts · sources return SourceResult never throw · no databases use flat files · .propane/ for runtime state. Use /new-cli to scaffold, /audit-cli to review, /fix-cli to execute a plan.\"}" ; else echo "{\"continue\":true}"; fi'
